purpose: Generated-reference Chatterbox candidate presets for future local Talon/Star review; not a production provider switch.

runtime_notes.norm_loudness_note: The evaluation disabled Chatterbox loudness normalization to avoid the known ROCm float64 reference-audio tokenizer failure; production should cast normalized references back to float32 or keep this explicit setting.

stt_context_prompt: Talon Star Honcho Eyrie KubeCM llama-qwen GitLab Puppet Kubernetes OpenVox ROCm kubectl owl voice-speech Chatterbox Kokoro

presets.reference_style: elegant neutral assistant distinct from Talon
presets.description: Talon candidate: warm, focused, clever, clear, calm ops voice; owl-ish without baby/chibi tone.
Star candidate: clear, bright, soft, friendly operations voice for local Chatterbox review.
